body:
## Summary

Follow-up for #1758 after PR #1759: default and CI tests still had paths that could create persistent screens or mutate a GitHub account.

This PR:
- keeps `tests/test-start-screen.mjs` in the default suite but forces its deprecated `start-screen` coverage to stop before GNU screen is reached;
- updates `scripts/test-auto-fork-option.sh` so the release-workflow `start-screen` check is dry-run and screen-hidden;
- makes `--suite integration` set `HIVE_MIND_RUN_INTEGRATION=1` for child tests;
- gates the real `gh-upload-log` checks behind integration mode so default tests do not create gists;
- marks `tests/test-isolation-screen-integration-1545.mjs` as opt-in integration-only;
- expands `docs/case-studies/issue-1758/` with the follow-up investigation data.

## Reproduction

Before this change, default or release checks could still reach unsafe paths:
- `node tests/test-start-screen.mjs` could create legacy `solve-*` / `hive-*` GNU screen sessions.
- `bash scripts/test-auto-fork-option.sh` invoked deprecated `start-screen` without `--dry-run`.
- `node tests/test-log-upload.mjs` invoked real `gh-upload-log` and could create a private gist.
- `tests/test-isolation-screen-integration-1545.mjs` was discovered by the default suite despite starting real screen isolation sessions when prerequisites existed.

## Verification

- `node tests/test-issue-1758-runner-discovery.mjs`
- `node tests/test-start-screen.mjs`
- `node tests/test-log-upload.mjs`
- `node tests/test-isolation-screen-integration-1545.mjs`
- `bash scripts/test-auto-fork-option.sh`
- `npm test` (`All 193 selected test file(s) passed.`)
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run format:check`
- `git diff --check`

No UI changes; screenshots are not applicable.

Fixes #1758
title: fix: keep unsafe tests out of the default suite
